2151060.name: Unusual Findings - Original Soundtrack
2151060.description:
内容简介

《离奇发现》的所有音轨均由MTV欧洲音乐大奖及拉丁格莱美奖提名阿根廷乐队Rayos Láser主唱兼贝斯手Tomas Ferrero创作。所有歌曲均含封面、制作信息和完整的元标签。

音轨列表

01 A Humble Place
02 But The Town Seems So Calm
03 Carpenter Love
04 Charging Energy
05 Dawn is Coming
06 Lights in the sky
07 Looming Danger
08 Relentless Visitor
09 Serpiente River
10 Something Is Off
11 Striding Nights
12 THE BULL
13 The Miracle Was Over
14 Underground Secret
15 Unexpected Creatures
16 Unusual Thing to Find

制作信息

乐曲由Tomas Ferrero创作。
